title: Observed Antibody Space — Unpaired Sequences (ConvergeBio HF mirror)
description: HuggingFace mirror of the Observed Antibody Space (OAS) unpaired dataset. Contains ~2.07B heavy-chain and ~357M light-chain antibody sequences from immune repertoire studies, distributed as 4,030 parquet shards (~2.45 TB). Original data compiled by OPIG (Oxford Protein Informatics Group).

title: Observed Antibody Space — Paired Sequences
description: Paired heavy/light chain antibody sequences from OAS. Sequences where both chains were sequenced from the same B-cell, enabling paired VH/VL analysis for antibody structure and binding studies.

title: Observed Antibody Space: A diverse database of cleaned, annotated, and translated unpaired and paired antibody sequences
description: Olsen TH, Boyles F, Deane CM (2022). Protein Science 31(1):141-146. The canonical citation for OAS. Database of annotated antibody sequences from B-cell repertoire sequencing studies, hosted by OPIG at the University of Oxford.
